data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for calendar synchronization, but there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for calendar sync, but the prior steps do not include any checks or confirmations regarding the actual integration with Google or Outlook calendars. This lack of evidence leads to a conclusion that there is a gap in satisfying the requirement for calendar synchronization.
gaps: No evidence confirming the functionality of calendar sync with Google/Outlook.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
